title: JWTDecodeError during login after secret rotation
body: Users could not log in after changing AUTH_SECRET. The maintainer found that stale tokens signed with the previous secret were still present in browser storage.
comments: Confirmed that backend JWT verification was using the new secret while the browser sent an old token.
Final maintainer answer: clear old tokens, ensure the API and frontend share the same JWT secret and algorithm, then restart the server.

title: Docs page missing env vars for local model server
body: The setup guide did not mention RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL or RAG_TOP_K.
comments: Final maintainer answer: add the RAG environment variables to the runbook and keep defaults usable locally.
